hypothesis: An SE(3)-equivariant graph neural network trained on the XDIP dataset (using the same 80/10/10 split and 100-point interpolated spectra) will predict EXAFS spectra with a mean absolute error at least 25% lower than the reported GIN baseline (reducing EXAFS MAE from ~0.101 to ≤0.075 on the held-out test set).
